Context
UBO's 2.0
just uploading documents
While scoping this feature, I analyzed real session data from LogRocket. Beyond the document upload requirement, the data revealed behavioral patterns worth tackling in this version too.
Ideations
🎨 Claude Design
2 Proposals Analyzed
Explored two approaches for surfacing document uploads within the UBO step. Both proposals were reviewed with the GPM, the squad's tech team, and presented in a design critique.
Final proposal
🤖 Claude Code
+
🎯 Cursor
Refinement & Polish
A single, refined proposal built on top of the explorations — balancing compliance requirements, conversion risk, and behavioral insights from the data.
Your turn.
Questions, feedback, comments — all welcome.
